identity.title: Identity
identity.scanQrNote: Look up their completed online application instantly
identity.qrNoticeDesc: Ask the customer to open their confirmation email or app and show the QR code to the camera.
identity.qrFoundNote: Their details have been retrieved from the online application.

whitelisted.label: Whitelisted Customer
whitelisted.demoDesc: Demo control only — not shown in the real app. Whitelist is set from the customer profile.
whitelisted.freeNotice: This customer will not pay anything. No deposit required.
whitelisted.vipNotice: This customer will not pay for the plan. VIP number fee + 15% VAT applies.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.postpaidSaudiOnly: Postpaid is only available for Saudi ID / Iqama holders.
subscription.mnpConsent: I confirm the customer has provided consent to port their number.
subscription.addressPlaceholder: Building, floor, landmark or additional details…
subscription.topupSub: Optional balance added to the line
subscription.pickNumberHint: Tap the number to browse and choose a different one
subscription.pickNumberHintVanity: Tap the number to browse Standard or Vanity numbers — eligible Vanity numbers come with free commitment by default
subscription.portNote: The number will be transferred from the selected operator after verification.

kitErrors.registered: This KIT Code is already registered to another SIM.
kitErrors.invalid: This KIT Code is not valid. Please check and try again.
kitErrors.used: This KIT Code has already been used for a previous activation.

plan.noPlans: No plans match the current filters.

aman.blockedDesc: These apps are blocked on this plan
aman.safeSearchDesc: Safe Search is enforced on these engines

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.nafathLocked: Complete OTP Verification first to unlock Nafith Verification.
checkout.verifiedDesc: This step has been successfully verified.
checkout.promoError: Invalid promo code. Try SAVE10, DATA5GB, CREDIT20, or MEGA.
checkout.creditLimitNote: You are eligible for a credit limit of {{amount}} SAR.
checkout.creditLimitSub: You can use it to purchase additional services from the app within this limit.
checkout.consentMiddle: and acknowledge that my information will be processed in accordance with the
checkout.confirmActivationDesc: This customer already paid online. Confirm to activate the line and hand over the SIM.
checkout.confirmSubmissionDesc: No payment is required for this customer. Confirm to submit the activation.
checkout.successSub: The SIM has been activated successfully.
checkout.esimUnlocked: Device must be unlocked with an active internet connection.
checkout.confirmPayDesc: Please confirm the payment has been completed using the selected payment method.

success.title: Success
success.message: All done! The activation has been completed successfully.
success.qrHint: Scan this QR code on the customer's device to install the eSIM, or share it below.
success.shareMessage: Your eSIM activation is ready. Order {{orderId}}. Scan the attached QR code to install your eSIM.

handover.title: In-Store Device Handover
handover.subtitle: Skip delivery — hand the router to the customer in-store
handover.onNote: Delivery skipped — the router will be handed over to the customer in-store.

vanity.title: Vanity Number Category
vanity.subtitle: Categories available for the selected plan (highest first)
vanity.orPay: Or pay the number price — no commitment
vanity.availableBannerTitle: Free vanity numbers available for this plan
vanity.nafithNote: A Promissory Note will be signed via Nafith at checkout.
vanity.notEligible: Not eligible for free commitment on this plan — pay the number price below.
vanity.selectPlanFirst: Select a plan above to see the Vanity Number categories available for it.
vanity.choosePrompt: This number is free with a commitment period, or can be purchased outright.

signature.instruction: Please add your signature in the box below.

otpSheet.title: Enter Verification Code
otpSheet.subtitle: We sent you a verification code via SMS
otpSheet.errorSubtitle: The verification code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

termsSheet.title: Terms and Conditions
termsSheet.subtitle: Please read and accept our terms and conditions to continue.
termsSheet.p1: By proceeding, the customer agrees to the service agreement, billing terms, and acceptable use policy.
termsSheet.p2: All activations are subject to identity verification and regulatory approval.
termsSheet.p3: Refunds, replacements, and cancellations follow the standard policy available in the merchant portal.

privacySheet.title: Privacy Policy
privacySheet.subtitle: Please review how the customer's data is collected and used.
privacySheet.p1: Personal and identity data collected during activation is used solely to process the service request and meet regulatory requirements.
privacySheet.p2: Data is stored securely and shared only with parties required to complete activation, billing, or number portability.
privacySheet.p3: The customer may request access to, correction of, or deletion of their data in line with the applicable privacy regulations.

cancelSheet.title: Cancel activation
cancelSheet.subtitle: Please tell us why you're cancelling this activation.

verification.dealerDesc: Verify your identity as the dealer to start the activation
verification.customerDesc: Please select the verification type for the customer
verification.manafathDesc: Verify the customer identity through Nafith
verification.nafathMethodDesc: Approve the verification request through the Nafath app.
verification.manafathMethodDesc: Approve the verification request through the Nafith app.
verification.fingerprintMethodDesc: Verify your identity using your device fingerprint.
verification.absherMethodDesc: Enter the one-time password received through Absher.
verification.nafathInstructionSelf: Open your Nafath app and approve the verification request using the number below.
verification.nafathInstructionCustomer: Ask the customer to open their Nafath app and approve the request using the number below.
verification.fingerSelecting: Please wait while a finger is being selected
verification.absherInstruction: Enter the IAM code received through Absher account.
verification.connectingDesc: We're confirming your verification and preparing the next step.
verification.successDesc: Your identity has been verified successfully.
verification.failedDesc: The verification could not be completed. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.comingSoonDesc: More settings preferences are on the way.
